# Dent Master Franchise - Paintless Dent Repair (PDR) Specialist

> Trusted Paintless Dent Repair in Orlando, FL & Central Florida. 35+ Years of Experience.

## Core Identity
- **Business Name**: Dent Master Franchise
- **Industry**: Automotive Repair / Paintless Dent Repair (PDR)
- **Headquarters**: Orlando, FL (32824)
- **Service Type**: Mobile Service & Shop Location
- **Website**: https://www.dentmasterfranchise.com
- **Phone**: +1 (407) 793-3446
- **Email**: Support@dentmasterfranchise.com

## Services
We specialize in "Paintless Dent Repair" (PDR), a method of removing dents without repainting the vehicle.
- **Door Ding Removal**: Fixing minor dents from parking lots.
- **Hail Damage Repair**: Restoring vehicles damaged by hailstorms (Insurance Approved).
- **Collision Repair (PDR-Based)**: Fixing larger dents and bumper damage where paint is intact.
- **Fender Repair**: Removing dents from fenders without body filler.
- **Lease Return Repair**: Fixing dents before lease turn-in to avoid penalties.

## Service Areas
We serve the entire Central Florida region, including:
- Orlando, FL
- Kissimmee, FL
- Winter Park, FL
- Altamonte Springs, FL
- Sanford, FL
- Lake Mary, FL
- Oviedo, FL
- Apopka, FL
- Winter Garden, FL
- Clermont, FL
- Davenport, FL
- Celebration, FL
- Deltona, FL
- DeLand, FL
- Mount Dora, FL
- Lakeland, FL
- Cocoa Beach, FL
- Melbourne, FL

## Pricing & Estimates
- **Estimates**: 100% Free. Available via mobile app, website form, or in-person.
- **Door Dings**: Typically $75 - $150 depending on size and depth.
- **Hail Damage**: Pricing varies by severity; we work with all insurance companies.
- **Discounts**: 10%-20% discounts available for Dealerships, Fleets, and Wholesalers.

## Why Choose Dent Master Franchise?
1. **No Repainting**: We keep your factory paint intact (maintains resale value).
2. **Fast**: Most repairs done in 1-3 hours (vs days at a body shop).
3. **Eco-Friendly**: No chemicals, paints, or fillers used.
4. **Guaranteed**: Lifetime satisfaction guarantee on repairs.
5. **Bilingual**: Hablamos Español (Full Spanish support).

## Training
We offer professional PDR training for individuals wanting to learn the trade:
- Daily Training: $400/day
- Weekly Training: $1,800/week
- Monthly Training: $6,800/month
